meta.title: Arce — Genesis · v27
meta.description: Every restoration is a beginning. The practice of Dr. Jorge Arce — oral & maxillofacial surgery, South Bay.

sections.k: Genesis — the practice of Dr. Jorge Arce
sections.title: Every restoration is a beginning.
sections.sub: Twenty-seven years of oral & maxillofacial surgery for the cases other surgeons refer out — planned carefully, done once, done right.

items.title: In the beginning, a conversation.
paras: Every case starts with an unhurried consultation: your history, your imaging, your questions — and an honest read of what is possible, in plain language.
No sales script. No pressure. Just surgical judgment, earned over twenty-seven years.

items.title: Order out of complexity.
paras: Implants, grafting, sequencing, restoration — mapped before anyone operates. The time the case actually needs, not the time the schedule allows.
Board certified in implantology; trained in Colombia, specialized in California.

items.title: Steady hands, steady nerve.
paras: Complex extractions. Reconstruction where bone and tissue have been lost. Full-arch All-On-X for patients told nothing could be done.
The difficult cases are the ordinary day at the Dental Implants Center of South Bay, est. 2007.

items.title: A smile that starts a life.
paras: Function first, then confidence. Long-term follow-up protects the work — and the person it belongs to.
Patients eat, smile, and speak again. That is the genesis this practice exists for.

sections.q: “Difficult work, done with care, gives people their lives back.”

cells.l: Founder, Dental Implants Center of South Bay

cards.q: “I had been told by two surgeons it was impossible. Dr. Arce took the time no one else did. I can eat, smile, and speak again.”
“The most thorough and honest surgeon I have ever met. He treated my father like family.”
